body:
# Continuous build Changelog

- Release tag: `continuous`
- Target commit: `ff846144b2633659e268d8718d4bd0129eacc44e`
- Previous marker: `1f886df2fa8398ef6a85066f29b50af3c4395353`
- Generated: 2026-07-24T11:17:29.004Z
- Compare: https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/compare/1f886df2fa8398ef6a85066f29b50af3c4395353...ff846144b2633659e268d8718d4bd0129eacc44e

## Commits

- [6e93e8d](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/6e93e8df4165d2a3494faeb8616b135a29fa6060) Bump fast-uri from 3.1.3 to 3.1.4 (#253)
- [6762bb9](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/6762bb9e3aa0db746a50cfa86c4640534399b824) Guided generation front door: premise → vocabulary → questions → Generate (#235). (#254)
- [780671e](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/780671e9275b2bfb823d5c777d4e3299ed63b7db) Recovery by checkpoint: stage snapshots, restore-stability, visible degrade (#237). (#255)
- [eeb4c4d](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/eeb4c4d14b5f793cdc6ae376b50383c04d053199) Bounded in-pipeline model calls: region theming + set-piece ranking (#236). (#256)
- [ca93d45](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/ca93d45eabe7929a61aa5094e05f8ab9c42100c4) Docs: model-in-the-loop is first-class architecture, epic #230 delivered (#238). (#257)
- [a64b38f](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/a64b38f63c74ced63137b1d71329063201148994) Parallelize the deterministic test tier (test:det) (#289)
- [9757e18](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/9757e180faed405203362a2723a17949c1f2f679) Add a consistent user-facing notice surface; kill silent failures (#287) (#291)
- [f225694](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/f225694c4a175a8b16566da4ce36e5fcf77d43a1) Fix #258: separate generated role/lens from the book citation (#261)
- [a87e1b7](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/a87e1b7b5cda3bec21ae160ef3bf9aa259b12d26) Add model-tier phase benchmark harness + findings (#266) (#293)
- [4a8db7d](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/4a8db7d5874acdd63fa2f8dcd52df7497359c7d9) Fix #259: persist and render the enhanced monster stat profile (#295)
- [9b658e8](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/9b658e8a674651d5a88eb46132de252c1e088fe6) Fix #279: gitignore agent scratch files (.pr-body-*, .issue-*-body, .triage-tmp) (#296)
- [4950f4d](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/4950f4dcc53a3e211c681873609b843369babf8f) Fix #278: CI guardrail against Math.random() in generation paths (#297)
- [95dcdc0](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/95dcdc08c1108a72bd37f33267983f3ebe45b21d) Fix #290: split phase2-wfc-smoke across parallel tier lanes (#299)
- [41a601b](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/41a601b7f35a9cc67467c86c0236a61f6834f404) Fix #285: Definition of Done for UI PRs — browser-verify gate + PR checklist (#300)
- [eda358e](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/eda358eccff877c9fb29078b422f04f613207032) Fix #251: typecheck tests/ and scripts/ in the deterministic tier (#298)
- [1a49944](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/1a499440c6fe5ba918238860276aa344bd1621f4) Fix typecheck on main: drop unused createPrng import in phase2-rerolls-smoke (#301)
- [7265c41](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/7265c41ecacc1f9989249c48cfc601a366065130) Fix #260: coherence gate — role/lens enhancement must suit the base monster (#302)
- [8090341](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/8090341e7348c5d0127f30d3765131263ded9610) Fix #262: move Base items catalog into Settings → Source Books (#304)
- [744c276](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/744c276010bc14a13c37f03e6f8140edefe72934) Fix #277: schema migration for saves; version errors preserve the autosave (#303)
- [8bc5233](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/8bc5233c1b9a17a1fd0b879d1d623533238c0cff) Fix #264: explanatory tooltips on every generation dropdown (#305)
- [299011a](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/299011acfb07296c59090da0eaca30378ddb84f6) Fix #271: Source Books inline help + per-book category breakdown (#306)
- [ff84614](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/ff846144b2633659e268d8718d4bd0129eacc44e) #110: banter coverage — 12 new tag events, 38 lines, 12 word triggers (#307)
name: Continuous build
